summary: Phase 3 Auto-Optimizer + Signal Journal improvements tested end-to-end. Backend optimizer APIs (Bayesian/Grid/Genetic, all objectives, validation, param overrides, apply-as-preset) working correctly. Frontend optimizer UI fully functional with progress tracking, robustness analysis, parameter importance, heatmap, and top alternatives. Signal Journal click-to-load, filter, and bulk-delete features working. BacktestLab deep-link (?run=<id>) auto-loads correctly. Navigation across all pages functional.

minor_issues.issue: sklearn not installed - param_importance falls back to variance-based calculation
minor_issues.impact: Parameter importance chart uses fallback method instead of Optuna's sklearn-based importance

passed_tests: BACKEND: POST /api/optimize/start with bayesian method returns job_id + status=queued
BACKEND: GET /api/optimize/jobs/{job_id} polls until done with best_params, best_metrics, top_n_alternatives, parameter_importance, robustness, heatmap
BACKEND: GET /api/optimize/jobs lists jobs sorted by created_at desc
BACKEND: POST /api/optimize/start with method=grid completes successfully
BACKEND: POST /api/optimize/start with method=genetic completes successfully
BACKEND: All objectives (sharpe, profit_factor, total_pnl_pts, win_rate, neg_max_dd, risk_adjusted) accepted and work
BACKEND: POST /api/optimize/start with invalid method returns 400
BACKEND: POST /api/optimize/start with non-existent strategy returns 404
BACKEND: POST /api/optimize/start with n_trials out of bounds (5, 10000) returns 400
BACKEND: param_overrides narrows search bounds correctly (ema_fast within [5,15])
BACKEND: DELETE /api/optimize/jobs/{job_id} deletes job
BACKEND: POST /api/optimize/apply-as-preset/{job_id}?name=X creates preset, verified in GET /api/presets
FRONTEND: /optimizer page loads with Optimization Setup panel and all fields visible
FRONTEND: Parameter Search Bounds (advanced) expansion shows min/max inputs for each param
FRONTEND: Auto-Optimize button starts optimization, progress card appears with status badge
FRONTEND: Trial progress bar updates, percentage updates
FRONTEND: Best so far card appears with param values + metric tiles
FRONTEND: After completion - Robustness card shows score + label + perturbation table
FRONTEND: Parameter Importance card shows bar chart with param names + percentages
FRONTEND: Heatmap card shows 2D grid with param names
FRONTEND: Top 10 Alternatives table shows ranked param sets with metrics
FRONTEND: Job History table shows past optimizations
FRONTEND: Click Job History row loads that job's results into Current Job view
FRONTEND: Delete buttons in Job History work
FRONTEND: Method selector switches between Bayesian/Grid/Genetic and updates description
FRONTEND: Objective selector switches and updates description
FRONTEND: Strategy dropdown changes update parameter overrides list
JOURNAL FRONTEND: /journal page - Backtest Run Journal table visible
JOURNAL FRONTEND: Filter input filters rows live by name/strategy/instrument/mode
JOURNAL FRONTEND: Click row navigates to /backtest and auto-loads run
JOURNAL FRONTEND: Per-row delete buttons present
JOURNAL FRONTEND: Bulk select via checkboxes works
JOURNAL FRONTEND: Bulk delete button appears when items selected
JOURNAL FRONTEND: Per-row load buttons present
JOURNAL FRONTEND: Refresh button works
BACKTEST LAB: URL deep-link /backtest?run=<id> triggers auto-load and strips query param
NAVIGATION: Dashboard, Backtest Lab, Optimizer, Live Signals, Paper Trading all load without errors

success_percentage.backend: 92.3% (12/13 tests passed, 1 expected failure due to no candles in date range)
